posts.title: Watchdog Reports ‘The View’ to FCC for Operating as Democrat Propaganda Posing as ‘News’

link_metadata.description: The Media Research Center (MRC) is escalating its challenge to ABC’s long-running daytime program "The View," arguing that the show functions as a partisan political platform rather than a legitimate news interview program and therefore should not receive an exemption from federal equal-time rules.
link_metadata.title: Watchdog Reports 'The View' to FCC for Operating as Democrat Propaganda Posing as 'News' - Slay News
